name: Lot On Plan Appelation
abstract: Parcel appellation shall be based on the Landgate parcel identifier model. Each parcel appellation shall be classified as Lot on Survey/Plan, Crown Allotment, or Miscellaneous. New parcels should normally use the Lot-on-Plan form, while legacy Crown Allotment and Miscellaneous identifiers shall remain supported where they are the authoritative legal description.
